# How to Use Skills

## Skill Usage with Github Copilot
A `.github` folder should be created in the root of your repository. Inside this folder, create a `skills` folder. Each skill should be placed in its own subfolder within the `skills` folder. The structure should look like this:

```
.github/
└── skills/
    ├── frontend-design/SKILL.md
    ├── backend-development/SKILL.md
    └── landing-page-design/SKILL.md
```
